name: git-span
description: Anchor implicit semantic dependencies between line ranges (or whole files) in code or prose, each carrying a one-sentence why that names the relationship the ranges hold.

capabilities: Journals apply_patch edits as they land
Drains a pre-commit record for the background reconciler to keep implicit semantic dependencies from silently drifting
defaultPrompt: Check `git span stale` for drifted spans and help me reconcile them.
